Index.meta_title: ToyuguoSec - Identity & Security Platform for AI Agents
Index.meta_description: The trust layer for AI Agents. Verify identity, monitor behavior, and detect threats in real time.

Hero.title: The <important>trust layer</important> for your AI Agents.
Hero.description: Verify Agent identity, track credit scores, and detect anomalous behavior in real time. Built for developers who take AI security seriously.

Features.section_title: Everything you need to secure your AI Agents
Features.section_description: ToyuguoSec gives every AI Agent a verifiable identity, a credit score, and real-time security monitoring — so you know exactly what your Agents are doing.
Features.feature_description: Built for AI developers who need to verify, monitor, and trust their Agents at scale.

Pricing.section_description: Start free and scale as your Agent fleet grows. No hidden fees.

FAQ.question: Do I need to give ToyuguoSec access to my Agent's source code?
FAQ.answer: No. ToyuguoSec works by integrating a lightweight open-source SDK into your Agent. The SDK only reports behavioral metadata — action types, success/failure status, timestamps — and never sends raw data, prompts, or business logic to our servers.

CTA.title: Ready to secure your Agents?
CTA.description: Join developers who trust ToyuguoSec to monitor and verify their AI Agents.
